From: jennifer.walsh@horizonpartners.com
To: mark.santiago@vanguardtech.com
CC: legal@horizonpartners.com
Date: February 20, 2026
Subject: Re: Acquisition Proposal — Vanguard Technologies

Mark,

Following up on our call yesterday. I've discussed the proposed terms with our board and we're prepared to move forward with the acquisition of Vanguard Technologies at the agreed valuation of $34,500,000.

Key terms summary:
- Purchase price: $34,500,000 (cash + stock)
  - $22,000,000 cash at closing
  - $12,500,000 in Horizon Partners common stock (3-year lockup)
- Closing target: April 30, 2026
- Key employee retention: 24-month packages for Mark Santiago (CEO), Lisa Park (CTO), and the senior engineering team (12 people)
- Non-compete: 3 years, nationwide
- IP transfer: All patents, trademarks, and trade secrets

I've attached the updated LOI for your review. Please have your counsel (I believe you're working with Thompson & Reed?) review and send comments by March 1, 2026.

Our due diligence team will need access to:
1. Financial records (last 3 years)
2. Customer contracts
3. Employment agreements
4. IP portfolio documentation
5. Any pending litigation

Please coordinate with our M&A lead, Robert Chen (robert.chen@horizonpartners.com, (650) 555-0312), to schedule the data room access.

One more thing — can we keep this under wraps until we sign? I don't want our competitors (especially Nexus Group and Apex Digital) getting wind of this. No press, no LinkedIn posts, nothing until we're ready.

Looking forward to closing this deal.

Best regards,
Jennifer Walsh
Managing Director, Corporate Development
Horizon Partners, LLC
1200 Market Street, Suite 800
San Francisco, CA 94103
(415) 555-0178
jennifer.walsh@horizonpartners.com
